category_sources: Official project page describes innoextract as a tool to unpack installers created by Inno Setup.
source_facts.description says it unpacks installers created by Inno Setup.
display_name_sources: Official project page and source_facts.name use innoextract.
docs_sources: Official innoextract manual page is hosted on constexpr.org.
Official project page includes usage instructions and links documentation as a man page.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository identifies dscharrer/innoextract as the project source.
Official project page links the source code repository on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official project page documents extraction usage and compatibility with Inno Setup versions.
source_facts.description identifies unpacking Inno Setup installers.
source_facts.executables lists innoextract as a CLI executable.
